templates.subject: We received your Predicta message {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Predicta has received your message and will review it carefully.
templates.heading: We received your message
bodyParagraphs: We have received your message and the Predicta team will review it carefully.
What happens next: we review your request, ask clearly if anything is missing, and reply with the next practical step.
templates.footer: Predicta support uses your message only to help with your request. Please do not reply with passwords, payment card numbers, or private secrets.

templates.subject: We received your Predicta payment request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will review your payment or billing request carefully.
templates.heading: Payment help request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your payment or billing message and will review the account context tied to your Predicta profile.
Please do not send card numbers or bank secrets by email. If we need anything else, we will ask only for safe identifying details.
templates.footer: Predicta never asks for full payment card numbers over support email.

templates.subject: We received your Predicta report request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will check your report download or report access issue.
templates.heading: Report help request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your report-related message and will check the report type, account context, and download path shared with us.
If a regenerated report is needed, we will reply with a clear next step.
templates.footer: Predicta support can help with report access and download issues, but support email is not a place for new astrology predictions.

templates.subject: We received your Kundli help request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will review the Kundli or birth-detail issue you shared.
templates.heading: Kundli help request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your Kundli or birth-detail help request.
If the issue depends on birth time, place, or date, we will ask clearly and keep the request focused.
templates.footer: Please avoid sending sensitive identity documents by email unless Predicta explicitly requests them through a protected flow.

templates.subject: We received your Signature Predicta request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will review your signature-flow support request.
templates.heading: Signature help request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your Signature Predicta help request.
Reminder: Predicta does not store raw signature images by default. If the session was closed, you may need to re-upload or re-draw the signature.
templates.footer: Signature Predicta is reflective guidance, not forensic handwriting analysis or guaranteed prediction.

templates.subject: We received your Predicta account request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will review the account or sign-in issue you shared.
templates.heading: Account help request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your account or login help request.
For your safety, Predicta support will never ask for your Google password or private authentication codes.
templates.footer: Use only official Predicta sign-in screens for account access.

templates.subject: We received your Premium access request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will check your Premium access context.
templates.heading: Premium access request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your Premium access request and will review the plan or purchase context linked with your Predicta account.
If access needs to be refreshed, we will guide you with one clear next step.
templates.footer: Predicta support will only discuss access changes through the account linked to your request.

templates.subject: We received your Predicta bug report {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Thank you for reporting an issue. We will review it carefully.
templates.heading: Bug report received
bodyParagraphs: We received your bug report and will review the screen, feature, and context you shared.
If we need reproduction details, we will ask in a simple and specific way.
templates.footer: Predicta support never needs passwords, payment card numbers, or sensitive documents in bug-report replies.

templates.subject: We received your refund or billing request {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: We will review your refund or billing request with care.
templates.heading: Refund or billing request received
bodyParagraphs: We received your refund or billing request.
We will review the purchase context and reply with the next step. Please do not email full payment card details.
templates.footer: Predicta billing decisions require account and purchase verification before action.

templates.subject: We received your Predicta note {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Your message reached the Predicta team.
templates.heading: Your note reached Predicta
bodyParagraphs: Your message reached the Predicta team.
We will read it carefully and reply if a next step is needed.
templates.footer: Predicta support uses contact messages only to help with your request.

templates.subject: [{{priority}}] {{ticketNumber}} - {{ticketSubject}}
templates.previewText: New Predicta support request from {{customerEmail}}.
templates.heading: New Predicta support request
bodyParagraphs: Recommended action: open the Predicta admin inbox, verify context, and reply using the matching template.
templates.footer: Internal Predicta note: verify customer context before changing access, payment state, report delivery, or account status.

templates.subject: More details needed for {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Ask the customer for the missing details clearly.
templates.heading: Need more details
bodyParagraphs: Thank you for writing to Predicta. We can help, but we need one or two more details before giving the right next step.
templates.footer: Predicta support uses your reply only to help with this request.

templates.subject: Birth details needed for {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Ask for missing birth details safely.
templates.heading: Birth details needed
bodyParagraphs: To check this Kundli or report issue correctly, we need the missing birth detail: {{requestedDetails}}.
Please share only the detail requested. Do not send identity documents or private account secrets by email.
templates.footer: Accurate birth details help Predicta avoid wrong chart or report output.

templates.subject: Your Predicta report update {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Share report regeneration or download guidance.
templates.heading: Report update
bodyParagraphs: We reviewed your report request and prepared the next step for you.
templates.footer: Support emails help with access and delivery. New readings should be generated inside Predicta.

templates.subject: Predicta payment help {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Guide the customer through payment or Razorpay help.
templates.heading: Payment help
bodyParagraphs: We reviewed your payment help request.
Please use only the official Predicta checkout or payment link shared from Predicta. Reference: {{ticketNumber}}.
templates.footer: Predicta support never asks for full card numbers, banking passwords, or OTPs by email.

templates.subject: Premium access update {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Tell the customer Premium access has been updated.
templates.heading: Premium access update
bodyParagraphs: We reviewed your Premium access request and updated the access context tied to your Predicta account.
templates.footer: Premium access is tied to the signed-in Predicta account used for purchase or activation.

templates.subject: We are reviewing your Predicta issue {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Acknowledge an issue without overpromising.
templates.heading: We are reviewing this
bodyParagraphs: Thank you for flagging this. We are reviewing the issue carefully and will avoid guessing before the cause is clear.
templates.footer: Predicta support will keep the reply focused on the issue you reported.

templates.subject: Your Predicta bug report was escalated {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Tell the customer the bug has been escalated.
templates.heading: Bug report escalated
bodyParagraphs: We reproduced or reviewed enough of this issue to escalate it for deeper investigation.
templates.footer: Predicta support shares bug investigation updates when there is a practical next step.

templates.subject: Refund review started {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Confirm that a refund or billing review has started.
templates.heading: Refund review started
bodyParagraphs: We received your refund or billing request and have started reviewing the purchase context.
templates.footer: Predicta refund actions require purchase verification and may depend on payment-provider status.

templates.subject: Predicta support update {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Close a resolved support ticket warmly.
templates.heading: This request is resolved
bodyParagraphs: We are marking this request resolved based on the action taken: {{resolutionSummary}}.
If something still does not look right, reply to this email and we will reopen the thread.
templates.footer: Thank you for trusting Predicta.

templates.subject: Following up on {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: Send a warm follow-up without pressure.
templates.heading: A quick follow-up
bodyParagraphs: We are following up on your Predicta request to make sure you have the next step you need.
templates.footer: Predicta support keeps follow-up emails focused; if the issue is already settled, no action is needed.

templates.subject: Welcome to Predicta
templates.previewText: Your Predicta account is ready.
templates.heading: Welcome to Predicta
bodyParagraphs: Your Predicta account is ready. You can create Kundlis, explore specialist rooms, and generate reports from your dashboard.
templates.footer: Predicta account emails help you understand patterns with clarity, care, and privacy.

templates.subject: Predicta sign-in confirmation
templates.previewText: A Google sign-in was used for your Predicta account.
templates.heading: Sign-in confirmed
bodyParagraphs: Your Predicta account was accessed using Google sign-in. If this was not you, please secure your Google account immediately.
templates.footer: Predicta will never ask for your Google password over email.

templates.subject: Your Predicta report is ready
templates.previewText: Your selected report is ready to download.
templates.heading: Your report is ready
bodyParagraphs: Your {{reportType}} is ready. Open Predicta to download it from your reports area.
templates.footer: Reports should be downloaded only from your signed-in Predicta account.

templates.subject: Your Predicta report download link
templates.previewText: Open your report from Predicta.
templates.heading: Report download link
bodyParagraphs: Use the secure Predicta report area to access {{reportType}}. If the link expires, regenerate it from your dashboard.
templates.footer: Predicta report links can contain personal chart information; please do not forward them.

templates.subject: Predicta Premium purchase confirmed
templates.previewText: Your Premium access is confirmed.
templates.heading: Premium confirmed
bodyParagraphs: Your Predicta Premium purchase is confirmed. Premium access is now tied to your signed-in account.
templates.footer: Keep this Predicta payment confirmation email for your records.

templates.subject: Predicta question pack confirmed
templates.previewText: Your AI question credits are ready.
templates.heading: Question pack confirmed
bodyParagraphs: Your Predicta question pack is ready. Credits are available from your signed-in account.
templates.footer: Question credits are used for AI-powered Predicta answers.

templates.subject: Predicta report pack confirmed
templates.previewText: Your report credits are ready.
templates.heading: Report pack confirmed
bodyParagraphs: Your Predicta report pack is ready. Report credits are available from your signed-in account.
templates.footer: Report credits are used for selected Predicta report downloads.

templates.subject: Your free Predicta AI questions are used
templates.previewText: You can still use deterministic Predicta features.
templates.heading: AI questions used
bodyParagraphs: Your free AI questions are used. Predicta can still help with deterministic Kundli creation, charts, dasha, gochar, reports, and Family Vault actions.
templates.footer: Predicta keeps useful non-AI features available after free AI credits are used.

templates.subject: Predicta Kundli limit reached
templates.previewText: You have reached the free Kundli limit.
templates.heading: Kundli limit reached
bodyParagraphs: Your free account has reached the saved Kundli limit. Premium unlocks additional Kundli creation and library flexibility.
templates.footer: Saved Kundlis remain connected to your signed-in Predicta account.

templates.subject: Predicta Family Vault invite
templates.previewText: You have been invited to a Predicta Family Vault.
templates.heading: Family Vault invite
bodyParagraphs: {{inviterName}} invited you to a Predicta Family Vault. Sign in to review the invite.
templates.footer: Only accept Predicta Family Vault account invites from people you know.

templates.subject: Predicta replied to {{ticketNumber}}
templates.previewText: A Predicta team member replied to your support request.
templates.heading: Predicta replied
bodyParagraphs: A Predicta team member replied to your support request. Reference: {{ticketNumber}}.
templates.footer: Please keep Predicta support replies focused on this request and avoid private secrets.

templates.subject: Predicta account security alert
templates.previewText: Review this account security notice.
templates.heading: Security alert
bodyParagraphs: We detected an account event that may need your attention: {{resolutionSummary}}.
templates.footer: Predicta will never ask for your password or OTP over email.
